title: YTPMV: Right outside my window
description:
Robotnik finally released his brutal heavy metal single "Right outside my window" with two bonus tracks, the death metal and the speed metal version.

MP3: http://www.mediafire.com/?gqoazmlzygz (thanks to yakeduli)

New Version with bass boost: http://www.megaupload.com/?d=JMUQYUWT
